title: Tense Moments with Great Authors
director: Harry B. Parkinson, W. Courtney Rowden, George Wynn
writer: Alphonse Daudet, Charles Dickens, George L. Du Maurier
actors: Phyllis Neilson-Terry, Charles Garry, Lyn Harding
plot: A series of twelve short films re-enacting highlights from famous novels. Individual titles are: #1: Trilby; #2: Les Miserables; #3: Sappho; #4: Nancy; #5: Fagin; #6: La Tosca; #7: Scrooge; #8: Vanity Fair; #9: East Lynne: #10: A ...
